Name: WLED Effects
Author: Beennnn
Description: All 216 WLED animated effects as looping Stream Deck key icons — one GIF per effect, from Solid, Rainbow and Fire to the AudioReactive, 2D and Particle System effects. The animated companion to WLED Palettes & Controls. Unofficial fan-made pack — not affiliated with, or endorsed by, the WLED project; "WLED" names compatibility only.
